revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-1-080

(Luminous) Ray

Alternative term: (Light) Ray

The path followed by light, which may be represented either by a straight line in a homogeneous medium, or by a bent or curved line in a non-homogeneous medium.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Luminous ray}}
